title: Interval Day Warm-Up (Detailed)
description: Thorough preparation for hard interval session
purpose: Thorough preparation for hard interval session

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 65%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 65% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 9 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 65% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 2:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 34% complete. 75% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 34% done. 7 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 2:00 at 68-75%. Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/5. 47% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 85% for 1:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 85% for 1:00. Then 6min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 1:00 at 85%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 3min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 8 minutes of work done. 5 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 1:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/5. You're 61% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 61% through session. Rep 3/5. You've done 3min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/5. You're building something real here. 2 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 115% for 0:20. Then 1:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 63% done. 0 intervals left. 4 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 3min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/5. You're 70% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% complete. 115% for 20s. Fatigue is real — maintain 95-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 4 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 1 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 70% complete. Rep 4/5. Fatigue is real — hold form. 115%, 95-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 10 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 72% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 72% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 10 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 11 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 1 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 79% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 2:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 65% for 2:00. 88-95 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 93% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 80-90 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 93% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
